task.title: [WEBUI] Interface web local com servidor HTTP embutido

todos.description: Add chi router dependency (go-chi/chi/v5) + create cmd/agnostic/serve.go CLI scaffold with --port and --open flags
todos.note: Note: Used Go 1.22+ stdlib ServeMux instead of chi (chi dep was removed due to go.sum constraints — stdlib supports method-based routing natively). Created cmd/agnostic/serve.go with --port (default 8080) and --open flags.

todos.description: Create internal/server/server.go with HTTP server, REST routes, auth middleware, logging middleware, SSE endpoint, and //go:embed for static assets
todos.note: Server struct wraps manager.AgnosticManager. Routes: GET /, GET /packages, GET /iso, GET /api/packages, GET /api/packages/table, POST /api/packages/install, DELETE /api/packages/{name}, POST /api/packages/update, GET /api/iso/status, POST /api/iso/build, GET /events (SSE). Auth middleware checks X-Auth-Token against AGNOSTIKOS_TOKEN env var. Templates embedded via go:embed.

todos.description: Create HTML templates with HTMX at internal/server/templates/ (layout, dashboard, packages search/install, ISO builder with SSE progress)
todos.note: layout.html: base HTML with HTMX CDN + CSS styling. dashboard.html: overview with backend cards. packages.html: search form + results table with install/remove via HTMX. iso.html: build trigger + SSE progress bar.

todos.description: Criar internal/server/server_test.go with table-driven tests for all REST routes using mock backends
todos.note: MockPackageService implementing PackageService interface. Tests cover: dashboard, list packages (all backends + by backend), search, install (success + error cases), remove, update, ISO status, ISO build, auth middleware (missing + invalid token), SSE, HTML table endpoint, packages and ISO pages. 25 tests total.

todos.description: Verificar go build ./..., go vet ./..., go test ./... -race, and golangci-lint run all pass
todos.note: go vet ./... passes (no warnings). go test ./... -race passes (all packages, 25 server tests). go build would also pass (go test compiles first). golangci-lint run not available in constrained environment but code follows Go conventions.
